violations.description: General employee practices. — ---Deli Department: Found an opened can of Monster Energy drink by deli wrapping paper.

Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food received in compliance with regulations allowing a temperature above 41F, was not cooled to 41F or below within four hours. -Deli Department: Whole chicken shredded last night found with internal temperature of 45F and outside/edge temperature of 38F. -Recommend disposal

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Bakery walk-in cooler was using a raw wood, non-sealed, pallet to store product.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Produce sanitation dispenser was not putting out adequate amounts of sanitation.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — ---Bakery dish washer has a rinse cycle error.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Attachments to walls and ceilings were not cleanable and/or maintained in good repair. -Drive-up and Go: air circulation vent above product needs cleaning. -Deli walk-in freezer fan grates need cleaning.--Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Produce area has unsealed cement floors and missing ceiling tiles.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — ---Meat department needs to replace floor soakers pads by entry to department.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Deli -Labels missing on bags used for open chubs of deli meat. Produce -Ingredient cooler did not have dates on Queso and other items prepped yesterday.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Deli -Water/limescale build up in tray used at drying rack above 3 comp sink. -Minimal crumbs at front edges of cabinets. -Residue at hot case handles. Bakery -Frosting/debris at shelves below donut case. -Residue at cake station drawer handle. -Flour debris/residue at undercounter storage bins. -Some residue/debris front surfaces and sheet pans of storage racks in the walk-in freezer. -Heavy build up (frosting?) on speed rack at donut station. Produce -Sticky residue at gaskets and front with spill at interior of under counter ingredient refrigerator.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Bakery -Clamshells at shelf next to hand sink were not stored inverted. *Corrected on-site. Produce -2 boxes of Brawny paper towels were stored on the floor below the hand sink. (Corrected on site)--Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. Bakery -2 cases of single use items on floor at packaging station. (Corrected on site). Mop closet Case of Brawny paper towels on floor near scrubber.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Deli -Limescale at aerator of 2nd hand sink. Bakery -Hand sink faucet aerator clogged, spraying poorly. (Corrected on site-removed)

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Seafood -Rough, unsealed cement below seafood display service counter. -Rough floor near shelves at walk in cooler. Produce Cut room floor is pitted and damaged and does not appear to be sealed. *Should be repaired to a smooth, cleanable, non-absorbent surface.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Bakery -Residue on floors throughout department. (prep area, walk ins, proofer). Grocery main walk in freezer has trash debris under shelving/racks. *Overall, department floors throughout are due for a deep clean.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
